understanding.goal_understanding: Place all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked '+' at the same time to trigger WIN and thereby complete the level/game within the available step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions consisted of MOVE_* to move the currently selected piece one tile in the given direction unless blocked by walls/obstacles, and CLICK on a coordinate to select/teleport/switch the active selectable piece to that clicked selectable position; clicks on invalid/blocked locations produced no movement effect. Walls/obstacles prevented movement into their tiles, and success required coordinating multiple pieces’ final positions simultaneously rather than moving one back and forth.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Place all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked '+' at the same time to trigger WIN and thereby complete the level/game within the available step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions consisted of MOVE_* to move the currently selected piece one tile in the given direction unless blocked by walls/obstacles, and CLICK on a coordinate to select/teleport/switch the active selectable piece to that clicked selectable position; clicks on invalid/blocked locations produced no movement effect. Walls/obstacles prevented movement into their tiles, and success required coordinating multiple pieces’ final positions simultaneously rather than moving one back and forth.
